label: Percentage identity
tooltip: Percentage of identical matches in the alignment

label: Number Mismatches
tooltip: Number of mismatches in the alignment

label: Number Gap open
tooltip: Number of gap openings in the alignment

label: Query start
tooltip: Start position of alignment in the query sequence

label: Query end
tooltip: End position of alignment in the query sequence

label: Target start
tooltip: Start position of alignment in the target sequence

label: Target end
tooltip: End position of alignment in the target sequence

label: Target Taxonomy IDs
tooltip: Taxonomy IDs of the taxa represented by the hit sequence

label: Target Taxonomy names
tooltip: Scientific names of the taxa represented by the hit sequence
